title: Kovakkara Kiliye Lyrics Vel
stanzas: <div>Kovakkara Kiliye Lyrics Vel

Kovakara kiliye
enna kothi vittu pogathe
aruvamanaiyai pola
nee puruvam
thookki kaattathe (2)

Etho etho konjam
vali kooduthe
ada kadhal ithu thaana?
eno eno nenjam
kudai saaiyuthe
ada kadhal ithu thaana?

Kovakara kiliye
enna kothi vittu pogathe
aruvamanaiyai pola
nee puruvam
thookki kaattathe

Ye sooriyakanthi
poova pola
mogatha thiruppuriye

nee sozhatti potta
sozhiya pola
sethari oduriye

Hey azhaga nee
ithama pesi aala usuppuriye
un kirudha mele
methuva saaya
enna thurathuriye

Mailapooru mayile
oru iragu podama
en sontha ooru madura
ada thalli nilaaiya

Urugaatha ponnumilla
udaiyaatha pennumilla
sarithan podi pulla

Meiyaatha aadumilla
meiyaatti pullumilla
solla thevaiyilla

Etho etho konjam
vali kooduthe
ada kadhal ithu thaana?
eno eno nenjam
kudai saaiyuthe
ada kadhal ithu thaana?

Kovakara kiliye
enna kothi vittu pogathe
aruvamanaiyai pola
nee puruvam
thookki kaattathe

Chittira maasa veyila pola
soota kelappuriye
nee pottal kaattu pulidhi
kaathaa enna suthuriye

Patramathu thangam pola
mousa kaatturiye
nee pakkaththu veettu
muruka pola
murukka irukkirye

Pathiram pota
kaiyaal oru
pathiyam podaiyaa?

Pattaa neeyum
thanthaal naan
paire vaippene

Pasi thaagam thonavila
paduthaalum thookkamila
kadhal ithu thaana?

Kannadi parthathu illa
munnadi neeyumila
kadhal ithu thaana?

Oh yetho yetho konjam
vali kooduthe
ada kadhal ithu thaana?
yeno yeno nenjam
kudai saaiyuthe
ada kadhal ithu thaana?

Kovakara kiliye
ennai kothi vittu pogathe
aruvamanaiyai pola
nee puruvam thookki kaattathe

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kovakkara Kiliye?

The song captures the essence of love and longing, beautifully expressed through its lyrics and melody.

Who are the singers of Kovakkara Kiliye?

The song is sung by Sujatha Mohan and Tipu.

Who composed the music for Vel?

The music for the movie Vel was composed by Yuvan.

What is the release year of the movie Vel?

The movie Vel was released in the year 2007.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Vel, the song Kovakkara Kiliye beautifully portrays the emotions of love and longing between the lead characters. The lyrics by Na Muthukumar evoke a sense of yearning, while Yuvan's melodious composition enhances the romantic mood. Sung by Sujatha Mohan and Tipu, the duet captures the delicate nuances of a blossoming romance. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics make it a memorable piece that resonates with anyone who has experienced love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Kovakkara Kiliye from the movie Vel, where Yuvan's soulful composition meets the harmonious voices of Sujatha Mohan and Tipu. This romantic duet beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Dive into the lyrical magic penned by Na Muthukumar and let the emotions flow.
stanzaMeanings: Oh angry parrot, don't leave me with longing. Don't raise your eyebrows like a sickle.
Something, something is causing a little pain. Is this love? Why, why is my heart feeling heavy? Is this love?
Oh angry parrot, don't leave me with longing. Don't raise your eyebrows like a sickle.
You turn your face like a sunflower.
You run away like a deer chased by a hunter.
Hey beautiful, you speak sweetly and make me restless. You slowly come close and then push me away.
Peacock from Mylapore, without a feather, my hometown Madurai is far away.
There is no unmelted gold, no woman without clothes, little boy Sarithan.
There is no cow without a tail, no grass without a cowherd, no need to say.
Something, something is causing a little pain. Is this love? Why, why is my heart feeling heavy? Is this love?
Oh angry parrot, don't leave me with longing. Don't raise your eyebrows like a sickle.
You heat me up like the sun in the month of Chithirai. You spin me around like a whirlwind.
You show off like fake gold. You are as tough as the boy next door.
With a hand holding a vessel, will you serve a meal?
If you give, I will save it.
Even without hunger or thirst, I can't sleep. Is this love?
I didn't see it in the mirror, you weren't in front of me. Is this love?
Oh something, something is causing a little pain. Is this love? Why, why is my heart feeling heavy? Is this love?
Oh angry parrot, don't leave me with longing. Don't raise your eyebrows like a sickle.
